coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that provides download functionality for media entries, enabling users to download video flavors, captions, images, and attachments from Kaltura-hosted content.

featureOwnership: Download overlay UI component with expandable sections
dataHandling: KalturaFlavorAsset - Video quality/flavor metadata and download URLs
KalturaCaptionAsset - Caption file metadata and download URLs
KalturaAttachmentAsset - Attachment file metadata and download URLs
DownloadMetadata - Aggregated download information per entry
Download URL resolution via Kaltura API
Plugin configuration state (flavorId, flavorParamId, display flags)

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.relationship: Core player framework - provides BasePlugin, player API, UI components, and media source information

upstream.name: @playkit-js/ui-managers
upstream.relationship: UI service layer - provides UpperBarManager, ToastManager for button injection and notifications

upstream.name: @playkit-js/common
upstream.relationship: Shared UI utilities - provides OverlayPortal, FocusTrap components

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js-providers
upstream.relationship: API provider layer - provides RequestBuilder and ILoader for Kaltura API calls

downstream.name: Kaltura Player embed pages
downstream.relationship: End-user facing - plugin renders download UI within player interface

downstream.name: Custom player integrations
downstream.relationship: Third-party - developers can use plugin events and configuration

externalApis.name: Kaltura flavorasset.list
externalApis.description: Retrieves available video flavors/qualities for an entry

externalApis.name: Kaltura flavorasset.getUrl
externalApis.description: Gets download URL for a specific flavor

externalApis.name: Kaltura caption_captionAsset.list
externalApis.description: Retrieves available captions for an entry

externalApis.name: Kaltura caption_captionAsset.getUrl
externalApis.description: Gets download URL for a specific caption file

externalApis.name: Kaltura attachment_attachmentAsset.list
externalApis.description: Retrieves available attachments for an entry

externalApis.name: Kaltura attachment_attachmentAsset.getUrl
externalApis.description: Gets download URL for a specific attachment

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration and exports - registers 'download' plugin with Kaltura Player
Main Download plugin class - extends BasePlugin, manages lifecycle and UI injection
Core business logic - handles download metadata fetching, file downloads, and overlay state
Download service layer - coordinates API calls and file download execution
Kaltura API loaders - FlavorsLoader, CaptionsLoader, AttachmentsLoader, DownloadUrlLoader
Main UI component - renders download overlay with sources, captions, and attachments

configurationOptions.flavorId: Specific video flavor ID to download
configurationOptions.preDownloadHook: Callback function executed before download starts
configurationOptions.undisplayedAttachments: Array of attachment types to hide (default: ['KalturaTranscriptAsset'])

events.SHOW_OVERLAY: Fired when download overlay is displayed
events.HIDE_OVERLAY: Fired when download overlay is closed
events.DOWNLOAD_ITEM_CLICKED: Fired when a download item is selected
